title: alyssum montanum subsp. gmelinii
intro: Alyssum montanum subsp. gmelinii, also known as Gmelin's alyssum or mountain alyssum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Alyssum montanum subsp. gmelinii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as an anti-arthritic agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to promote relaxation and alleviate various health issues.
